seo.title: Industries We Serve | Beverage Equipment Traders
seo.description: Brewery, distillery, cidery, food processing, dairy, and pharmaceutical equipment. BET serves production operations across industries with the same food-grade stainless inventory.

hero.imageAlt: Production equipment for beverage and processing industries
hero.heading:
Equipment Built for Production.
Industries Beyond Brewing.
hero.body: Beverage Equipment Traders started in craft brewing. The food-grade stainless equipment, processing systems, and industrial infrastructure we carry serves production operations well beyond the brewery floor — distilleries, cideries, food processors, dairy operations, and pharmaceutical facilities all source from the same equipment pool.

beverage.heading: Craft Beverage Operations
beverage.body: Our core market. Brewhouses, fermenters, canning lines, glycol systems, and full equipment lifecycle services for craft beverage producers at every scale.

industrial.heading: Beyond the Brewery Floor
industrial.body: Food-grade stainless tanks, CIP systems, heat exchangers, pumps, and processing infrastructure have applications across food manufacturing, dairy, and pharmaceutical operations. The same equipment pool, different production contexts.

why.heading: One inventory. Every production context.
paragraphs: Food-grade 304 and 316L stainless steel does not know what industry it is in. A jacketed fermenter from a brewery liquidation serves a craft brewery, a kombucha producer, a dairy processor, and a pharmaceutical operation equally well — the specifications are what matter, not the prior use.

Beverage Equipment Traders provides honest specification data, condition documentation, and operator context across every piece in our inventory. Whatever your production application, we advise on what equipment actually meets your requirements.

items.title: Nationwide Shipping
items.description: All 50 states from our San Marcos facility.

items.title: Operator Documentation
items.description: Condition notes, specs, and photos on every piece.

items.title: Rigging & Installation
items.description: Full-service moves for any production application.

items.title: Honest Guidance
items.description: We tell you if something fits your application.

finalCta.heading: Not sure if we serve your industry?
finalCta.body: Describe your application and equipment requirements. We will tell you what we have and whether it fits.
